## Entries Wanted

The following tools are known to have existed but do not yet have entries. If you have information or files, please open an issue.

| Tool | Notes |
| --- | --- |
| Bronc Buster | Web CGI scanner, circa 1999 |
| Brutus | Web/network password auditor, circa 2000 |
| Paros | Web proxy/scanner, early 2000s |
| WebSleuth | \~2000 |
| Achilles | Web proxy, \~1999, DiGiT |
| N-Stealth | Commercial, NTA Monitor, \~2000 |
| Wikto | Nikto-derived Windows tool, \~2004 |
| Sandcat | Commercial web scanner, Syhunt, \~2003 |
| wwwscan | bsrf , \~1997 |
